networkedlearning.ai

Learning Networks in a Connected World

An interdisciplinary workshop initiative exploring how network science and AI help us understand, model and support learning across formal, informal and online environments.

Learning is inherently social and networked. This initiative examines how learning networks emerge and evolve, how network structure relates to engagement and outcomes, and how data-driven and AI-based methods can support productive learning relationships.

Explore workshops

Workshop at ASONAM 2026
